results.notes: ✔ TC-010h: readAitriState — returns aitriVersion, updatedAt, createdAt when present (1.063959ms)
✔ TC-010f: readAitriState — returns null for aitriVersion, updatedAt, createdAt when absent (1.4525ms)
✔ TC-010e: readAitriState — returns aitriVersion=null when field is a number (1.6045ms)
✔ TC-011h: readAitriState — artifactsDir "spec" preserved when explicit (1.716542ms)
✔ TC-011f: readAitriState — artifactsDir defaults to "" when field absent (1.383375ms)
✔ TC-011e: readAitriState — projectName defaults to path.basename(projectDir) when absent (0.561667ms)
✔ TC-012h: detectDrift — driftPhases fast path returns hasDrift=true (1.032834ms)
✔ TC-012f: detectDrift — empty driftPhases[] does not trigger drift (0.857542ms)
✔ TC-012e: detectDrift — absent driftPhases (pre-v0.1.58) falls through without throwing (12.951792ms)
✔ TC-013h: detectDrift — hasDrift=false when artifact matches stored hash (8.513208ms)
✔ TC-013f: detectDrift — hasDrift=true when artifact differs from stored hash (1.0685ms)
✔ TC-013e: detectDrift — approved phase with no stored hash is NOT counted as drifted (0.407ms)
✔ TC-013e2: detectDrift — artifact file missing on disk returns hasDrift=false without throwing (0.55175ms)
✔ TC-014h: evaluateAlerts — VERSION_MISMATCH alert when project version differs from CLI (0.272333ms)
✔ TC-014f: evaluateAlerts — no VERSION_MISMATCH when aitriVersion is null (0.4835ms)
✔ TC-014e: evaluateAlerts — no VERSION_MISMATCH when CLI version unavailable (null cache) (0.16175ms)
✔ TC-014e2: evaluateAlerts — no VERSION_MISMATCH when versions match (0.070292ms)
✔ TC-010e2e: aitriVersion flows from .aitri through readAitriState correctly (11.629541ms)
✔ TC-014e3e: VERSION_MISMATCH alert generated when project aitriVersion differs from cached CLI version (2.978666ms)
